instructions: Eradicate the final two pieces of technical debt in the codebase. Analyze the `try` blocks associated with the blind exceptions at `src/jitsu/core/orchestrator.py` (around line 113) and `src/jitsu/server/handlers.py` (around line 130). Replace `except Exception as e:` with the explicit exceptions that can actually be raised by the enclosed code (e.g., `ValueError`, `KeyError`, `OSError`). Remove the `# noqa: BLE001` comments completely.
anti_patterns: STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do not replace `Exception` with another broad catch like `BaseException`.
STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do not add new `# noqa` or `# type: ignore` comments to bypass the linter.
completion_criteria: The blind `except Exception` blocks are replaced with targeted exception handling.
The `# noqa: BLE001` comments are deleted.
The codebase passes all linting checks.
